name: RPlog_The_Best_In_The_Galaxy
title: The Best in the Galaxy
summary: Aboard the Star Destroyer Predator, the ace pilot Axel takes the newly recruited Wolf, a former TIE fighter pilot, on a live-fire training duel in matched top-end Headhunter II space-superiority fighters. Axel challenges Wolf to disable his shields with no half measures, and the silent, aggressive Wolf surprises him with a punishing opening run, trading torpedo volleys and tight evasive rolls across several exchanges. The fight stays close until Axel finally breaks through Wolf's shields and scores a hull hit, ending the duel one shot short of a Wolf victory. Impressed, Axel offers Wolf a place as his wingman and reveals the fighter Wolf flew once belonged to Danik Kreldin. The two pilots form up and scream back into the Predator's hangar, each unwilling to be outdone in the cockpit.
